title: Codex for (almost) everything
summary: The updated Codex app for macOS and Windows adds computer use, in-app browsing, image generation, memory, and plugins to accelerate developer workflows.
title_es: OpenAI actualiza Codex con uso de computadora y generación de imágenes
bajada: OpenAI lanzó una actualización mayor de Codex que añade capacidades de uso de computadora, navegación web integrada, generación de imágenes y memoria persistente. Esta mejora busca competir directamente con Claude Code de Anthropic en el segmento de herramientas de desarrollo agenticas.
bajada_en: OpenAI released a major Codex update adding computer use, in-app browsing, image generation, and memory capabilities. This upgrade directly competes with Anthropic's Claude Code in the agentic development tools space.

title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.7ProductApr 16, 2026Our latest Opus model brings stronger performance across coding, agents, vision, and multi-step tasks, with greater thoroughness and consistency on the work that matters most.
summary: Product Announcements Introducing Claude Opus 4.7 Apr 16, 2026 Our latest model, Claude Opus 4.7, is now generally available. Opus 4.7 is a notable improvement on Opus 4.6 in advanced software engineering, with particular gains on the most difficult tasks. Users report being able to hand off their hardest coding work—the kind that previously needed close supervision—to Opus 4.7 with confidence. Opus 4.7 handles complex, long-running tasks with rigor and consistency, pays precise attention to instructions, and devises ways to verify its own outputs before reporting back. The model also has substantially better vision: it can see images in greater resolution. It’s more tasteful and creative when completing professional tasks, producing higher-quality interfaces, slides, and docs. And—although it is less broadly capable than our most powerful model, Claude Mythos Preview—it shows better results than Opus 4.6 across a range of benchmarks: Last week we announced Project Glasswing , highlighting the risks—and benefits—of AI models for cybersecurity. We stated that we would keep Claude Mythos Preview’s release limited and test new cyber safeguards on less capable models first. Opus 4.7 is the first such model: its cyber capabilities are not as advanced as those of Mythos Preview (indeed, during its training we experimented with efforts to differentially reduce these capabilities). We are releasing Opus 4.7 with safeguards that automatically detect and block requests that indicate prohibited or high-risk cybersecurity uses. What we learn from the real-world deployment of these safeguards will help us work towards our eventual goal of a broad release of Mythos-class models. Security professionals who wish to use Opus 4.7 for legitimate cybersecurity purposes (such as vulnerability research, penetration testing, and red-teaming) are invited to join our new Cyber Verification Program . Opus 4.7 is available today across all Claude products and our API, Amazon Bedrock, Google C
title_es: Anthropic presenta Claude Opus 4.7 con mejoras en ingeniería de software
bajada: Anthropic lanzó Claude Opus 4.7, su modelo más capaz disponible públicamente, con mejoras significativas en tareas de codificación compleja y análisis de imágenes de mayor resolución. El modelo maneja mejor tareas largas y complejas con mayor consistencia, permitiendo a developers confiar trabajos difíciles sin supervisión cercana.
bajada_en: Anthropic released Claude Opus 4.7, its most powerful publicly available model, with significant improvements in complex coding tasks and higher-resolution image analysis. The model better handles long, complex tasks with consistency, letting developers confidently hand off difficult work without close supervision.

It's also supposed to be better at analyzing images and following instructions, and it […]
title_es: Factory logra valuación de $1.5B para plataforma de codificación IA empresarial
bajada: La startup Factory recaudó $150 millones liderados por Khosla Ventures, alcanzando una valuación de $1.5B en su ronda de financiación. La compañía se enfoca en automatizar codificación para empresas, reflejando el creciente interés de inversores en herramientas de desarrollo agenticas.
bajada_en: Factory raised $150 million led by Khosla Ventures, reaching a $1.5B valuation. The startup focuses on automating coding for enterprises, reflecting growing investor interest in agentic development tools.

bajada: Physical Intelligence reveló π0.7, un modelo que puede realizar tareas robóticas que nunca fue entrenado explícitamente a hacer. La startup describe esto como un paso significativo hacia el objetivo de crear un cerebro robótico de propósito general.
bajada_en: Physical Intelligence revealed π0.7, a model that can perform robotic tasks it was never explicitly trained to do. The startup describes this as a meaningful step toward achieving a general-purpose robot brain.

title_es: Reino Unido lanza fondo soberano de IA de $675 millones
bajada: El gobierno británico anunció un fondo de $675 millones para invertir en startups de IA locales y reducir dependencia tecnológica de otros países. Esta iniciativa refleja la tendencia global de gobiernos buscando capacidades de IA independientes.
bajada_en: The UK government announced a $675 million sovereign AI fund to invest in local AI startups and reduce technological dependence on other countries. This initiative reflects the global trend of governments seeking independent AI capabilities.

bajada: Google actualizó AI Mode en Chrome permitiendo abrir links junto al chat sin cambiar de pestaña. Los usuarios pueden ahora hacer preguntas de seguimiento sobre el contenido de la página directamente en el navegador.

bajada: Grandes empresas de tecnología avanzan en la transición a criptografía resistente a computadoras cuánticas, aunque a ritmos distintos. El progreso es crítico para proteger infraestructuras de seguridad en la era de la computación cuántica.

bajada: Un developer creó servidores MCP para conectar Claude Code con su osciloscopio y simulador SPICE, cerrando el ciclo entre simulación y hardware real. El proyecto muestra aplicaciones prácticas emergentes de modelos agenticos en ingeniería electrónica.
bajada_en: A developer created MCP servers connecting Claude Code to their oscilloscope and SPICE simulator, closing the loop between simulation and real hardware. The project demonstrates emerging practical applications of agentic models in electronics engineering.

title: ProductApr 17, 2026Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic LabsToday, we’re launching Claude Design, a new Anthropic Labs product that lets you collaborate with Claude to create polished visual work like designs, prototypes, slides, one-pagers, and more.
summary: Product Announcements Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs Apr 17, 2026 Today, we’re launching Claude Design, a new Anthropic Labs product that lets you collaborate with Claude to create polished visual work like designs, prototypes, slides, one-pagers, and more. Claude Design is powered by our most capable vision model, Claude Opus 4.7 , and is available in research preview for Claude Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise subscribers. We’re rolling out to users gradually throughout the day. Design with Claude Even experienced designers have to ration exploration—there's rarely time to prototype a dozen directions, so you limit yourself to a few. And for founders, product managers, and marketers with an idea but not a design background, creating and sharing those ideas can be daunting. Claude Design gives designers room to explore widely and everyone else a way to produce visual work. Describe what you need and Claude builds a first version. From there, you refine through conversation, inline comments, direct edits, or custom sliders (made by Claude) until it’s right. When given access, Claude can also apply your team’s design system to every project automatically, so the output is consistent with the rest of your company’s designs. Teams have been using Claude Design for: Realistic prototypes: Designers can turn static mockups into easily-shareable interactive prototypes to gather feedback and user-test, without code review or PRs. Product wireframes and mockups: Product Managers can sketch out feature flows and hand them off to Claude Code for implementation, or share them with designers to refine further. Design explorations: Designers can quickly create a wide range of directions to explore. Pitch decks and presentations: Founders and Account Executives can go from a rough outline to a complete, on-brand deck in minutes, and then export as a PPTX or send to Canva. Marketing collateral: Marketers can create landing pages, social media assets, and campaign visuals
title_es: Anthropic lanza Claude Design para crear diseños con IA
bajada: Anthropic presenta Claude Design, una herramienta que permite colaborar con Claude para crear diseños, prototipos y presentaciones de forma rápida. Disponible en preview para suscriptores de Claude Pro, Max, Team y Enterprise, utiliza el modelo Claude Opus 4.7.
bajada_en: Anthropic introduces Claude Design, a tool that lets you collaborate with Claude to quickly create designs, prototypes, and presentations. Available in preview for Claude Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise subscribers, it uses the Claude Opus 4.7 model.

title_es: OpenAI cierra Sora y su equipo de ciencia se reorganiza
bajada: OpenAI abandona el desarrollo de Sora (generación de video) y desmantela su equipo de investigación científica, marcando un giro estratégico hacia inteligencia artificial empresarial. Kevin Weil y Bill Peebles, líderes de estos proyectos, dejan la compañía.
bajada_en: OpenAI shuts down Sora development and disbands its science team, signaling a strategic shift toward enterprise AI. Kevin Weil and Bill Peebles, leaders of these initiatives, are leaving the company.

summary: Kevin Weil and Bill Peebles are leaving OpenAI as the company shuts down Sora and folds its science team, signaling a sharp pivot away from consumer moonshots toward enterprise AI.

bajada: El editor de código impulsado por IA Cursor está en conversaciones para recaudar más de $2 mil millones, alcanzando una valuación de $50 mil millones. A16z y Thrive liderarían la ronda, consolidando el crecimiento acelerado del editor en el segmento empresarial.
bajada_en: AI-powered code editor Cursor is in talks to raise over $2 billion at a $50 billion valuation. A16z and Thrive are expected to lead the round, consolidating the editor's explosive growth in the enterprise segment.

title_es: Tokenmaxxing reduce productividad a largo plazo
bajada: Un análisis revela que optimizar tokens en prompts (tokenmaxxing) genera código más costoso y requiere más revisiones posteriores. Aunque produce más código, los desarrolladores terminan siendo menos productivos y gastando más presupuesto.
bajada_en: An analysis shows that token optimization in prompts (tokenmaxxing) results in more expensive code requiring more revisions. While generating more code, developers end up less productive and spending more budget.

title: ‘Tokenmaxxing’ is making developers less productive than they think
summary: There's a lot more code — but it's a lot more expensive and requires a lot more rewriting.
